{{Quote|Good to have you here, soldier. We need your help. With the increasing threat of the Rebels attacking our research facility here in Restuss, we need to ramp up our defensive forces. In order to do that, we need weapons. If you're a trader, your orders are to create a rocket launcher for the Imperial army.|Lieutenant Pofko|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Pofko''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was in charge of obtaining weaponry, and restocking munitions during the [[Battle of Restuss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Pofko was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
